message:
✨ Add correct Cadence install mission using official Helm chart (#1460)

Replaces the previously fabricated kubectl-based install with the
official Helm chart from cadence-workflow/cadence-charts.

Source: https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence-charts README
Helm repo verified: https://cadence-workflow.github.io/cadence-charts

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "install-cadence-workflow",
+  "missionClass": "install",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "Install and Configure Cadence Workflow on Kubernetes",
+    "description": "Cadence is a distributed, scalable, durable, and highly available orchestration engine designed to execute asynchronous long-running business logic in a resilient manner. The official Helm chart deploys Cadence backend services (frontend, history, matching, worker) with database support (Cassandra, PostgreSQL, or MySQL).",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Add the Cadence Helm repository",
+        "description": "Add the official Cadence Helm chart repository.\n```bash\nhelm repo add cadence https://cadence-workflow.github.io/cadence-charts\nhelm repo update\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install Cadence using Helm",
+        "description": "Install Cadence with default settings (includes Cassandra as the backing store).\n```bash\nhelm install cadence-release cadence/cadence --namespace cadencetest --create-namespace\n```\nFor PostgreSQL instead of Cassandra:\n```bash\nhelm install cadence-release cadence/cadence --namespace cadencetest --create-namespace \\\n  --set cassandra.enabled=false \\\n  --set postgresql.enabled=true\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the installation",
+        "description": "Wait for schema setup jobs to complete, then check that all pods are running.\n```bash\nkubectl get jobs -n cadencetest\nkubectl get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-release -n cadencetest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Post-install configuration",
+        "description": "Customize replica counts and resource limits as needed.\n```bash\nhelm upgrade cadence-release cadence/cadence --namespace cadencetest \\\n  --set server.frontend.replicaCount=3 \\\n  --set server.history.replicaCount=3\n```\nSee the chart's values.yaml for all configuration options."
+      }
+    ],
+    "uninstall": [
+      {
+        "title": "Remove Cadence deployment",
+        "description": "Uninstall the Cadence Helm release.\n```bash\nhelm delete cadence-release --namespace cadencetest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Clean up the namespace",
+        "description": "Remove the namespace to clean up all associated resources.\n```bash\nkubectl delete namespace cadencetest\n```"
+      }
+    ],
+    "upgrade": [
+      {
+        "title": "Update Helm repository",
+        "description": "Fetch the latest chart versions.\n```bash\nhelm repo update\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Cadence",
+        "description": "Upgrade to the latest chart version.\n```bash\nhelm upgrade cadence-release cadence/cadence --namespace cadencetest\n```"
+      }
+    ],
+    "troubleshooting": [
+      {
+        "title": "Schema jobs failing",
+        "description": "Check schema setup job logs if services fail to start.\n```bash\nkubectl logs job/cadence-release-schema-server -n cadencetest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Pods not starting",
+        "description": "Ensure schema jobs completed before services start.\n```bash\nkubectl get jobs -n cadencetest\nkubectl describe pod -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cadence-release -n cadencetest\n```"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Cadence is installed via the official Helm chart from https://cadence-workflow.github.io/cadence-charts. The chart deploys frontend, history, matching, and worker services with automatic schema initialization.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": ["cadence", "workflow", "orchestration", "cncf"],
+    "cncfProjects": ["cadence-workflow"],
+    "targetResourceKinds": ["Deployment", "Service", "Job"],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": ["deploy"],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "helmRepoUrl": "https://cadence-workflow.github.io/cadence-charts",
+    "helmChartName": "cadence/cadence",
+    "containerImages": ["ubercadence/server:latest"],
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence",
+      "docs": "https://cadenceworkflow.io/docs/"
+    }
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.19",
+    "tools": ["kubectl", "helm"],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with Helm 3.2.0+ installed and PV provisioner support."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-18T17:00:00.000Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "manual-audit",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
